textDisplay: This is exactly the beginner guide I needed, my knives are always dull.
Appreciate it. A cheap whetstone honestly changed my whole cooking game.
Great walkthrough, subscribed for more dorm cooking tips.
Thank you. More budget kitchen basics coming soon.
Tried this on my old chef knife last weekend and it worked perfectly.
Glad it helped. A sharp knife makes dorm cooking so much safer.
The dusty piano sample on this is so smooth, love your lo-fi sound.
Thanks. I made most of this between A&P study sessions, means a lot.
Downloaded the free beat, this is perfect for late-night studying.
Appreciate the support. Tag me if you use it for anything.
Broke college sourdough is a genius idea, mine never rises though.
Give the starter more time and warmth, took me a few tries too.
Nice pace on this one, easy to follow for a first attempt.
Thank you. First loaf is always rough but it gets easier fast.
Made this on a dining-hall budget and it actually came out edible.
That is a win. Cheap flour and patience is all it really takes.
Love seeing a little pollinator patch on a student budget, so relaxing.
Thanks. It is a nice break from nursing prereqs, the bees showed up fast.
Fitting easy miles around a full class load is the real challenge, good tips.
Appreciate it. Morning runs keep me sane during a heavy semester.
This study-with-me got me through my own A&P review, thank you.
So glad it helped. The skeletal system flashcards saved my grade.
Great video. The dosage calc section helped a ton before my midterm. (000)
As a pre-nursing student this was exactly the review I needed. (001)
